# Embedded Messaging

Reach your customers with personalized, native messaging to guide their next action. Leading brands rely on Iterable Embedded Messaging to quickly and easily integrate messages in their apps and websites for use cases spanning the customer lifecycle.

Request Demo

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Embedded-Messaging_01.png)

## Marketer-Friendly Campaign Creation

Embedded Messaging was built for Marketers. Once initial placements are built, create new content with easy-to-use templates – no app store updates needed. Make changes even while your campaign is in-flight!

## Ultimate Personalization with Real-time Eligibility

Iterable watches for changes in the user state constantly — no marketer intervention necessary. The moment a user becomes eligible, or ineligible, to see a message (based on the segmentation criteria you’ve set), Iterable updates the user’s view – in real time.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Embedded-Messaging_02.png)

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Embedded-Messaging_03.png)

## Create Non-Intrusive Messaging

By design, Embedded Messaging content is delivered to users without interrupting their in app or on web experience. Create carousels, hero banners, and feeds, or create something completely custom – no more distractions from annoying pop-ups.

## Under the Hood

**Real-Time Eligibility**  
User state constantly monitored so content is personalized in real-time

**Dynamic Personalization**  
Handlebars, snippets & data feeds

**In App or On Site**  
iOS, Android, and Web

**No App Store Updates**  
After initial placements are built, no app updates needed

**Easy to Use Templates**  
Include interactive content and CTAs

**Message Placement Options**  
3 out-of-the-box form factors provided or can be completely customized

**Message Priority and Sequencing Control**  
Controlled at the placement level

**Journey Building**  
Trigger an Embedded Message within a journey or incorporate into existing journeys

**Show to Anonymous Users**  
Display Embedded Messages to both anonymous and known users

**Campaign and Messaging Insights**  
In-depth insights help to measure success

**Smart Billing & Reporting**  
Transparent spend visibility
